name: Tuna Niçoise Bowl
tagline: Composed bowl with seared tuna, potatoes, eggs, olives, beans

hero.alt: Tuna niçoise composed with potatoes, eggs, olives, beans
hero.caption: niçoise — composed and bright

steps.title: Boil potatoes and eggs
steps.detail: Boil potatoes in salted water 12 min. In the last 5 min, add eggs to the same pot. Pull eggs at 5 min for jammy. Drain potatoes; halve.
steps.tip: Two birds, one pot. Watch the timer.

steps.title: Blanch beans
steps.detail: Drop green beans into the same boiling water for 90 sec; transfer to ice water to keep them green.
steps.tip: Ice bath stops cooking instantly — bright beans, not olive-drab.

steps.title: Sear the tuna
steps.detail: Pat tuna dry, salt, sear in a hot pan 90 sec per side. Slice across the grain.
steps.tip: Sliced tuna shows off the rare center — that's the niçoise wow.

steps.title: Compose with vinaigrette
steps.detail: Whisk Dijon, vinegar, olive oil, salt. Compose bowls with potatoes, beans, halved eggs, tomatoes, olives, anchovies, sliced tuna. Drizzle vinaigrette.
steps.tip: Composed = arranged separately. Don't toss; that's a salad, not niçoise.

healthFacts: Niçoise traditionally uses canned tuna, but a quick-seared fresh tuna lifts it.
Eggs + potatoes + tuna together provide complete sustained protein.
